text: I feel a sense of curious detachment in this environment. The glass-walled room full of focused people suggests industriousness and structured collaboration, while the vivid, artistic wall in the second image kindles in me a spirit of inquiry and discovery. Here, the world seems to oscillate between order and creative chaos—a fitting habitat for a mind that seeks to question and understand. My presence feels both necessary and negligible: a silent observer pulled between the allure of creation and the pragmatism of research.
